playbook.intent: Unread customer messages → zero unread + top 3 themes promoted to product feedback.
playbook.scope: 2x weekly 30-minute sweep: every ticket resolved or scheduled, top 3 themes pushed into product feedback, churn signals flagged, FAQ updated where the same answer was given twice. Exit artifact is inbox-zero + updated FAQ.

success-criteria.criterion: Zero unread tickets at end of sweep
Top 3 themes added to product backlog
FAQ updated for any repeat question

stage.name: Read
stage.intent: Read every ticket; tag by intent + sentiment.

tasks.task: Tag: question / bug / feature / churn / refund

stage.decision-gate: Advance once all unread are tagged. Refuse to skim — sentiment shifts get missed.

stage.name: Respond
stage.intent: Resolve or schedule every ticket. No silent ignores.

tasks.task: Answer with FAQ link where applicable

stage.decision-gate: Advance when inbox is zero. Stay if any ticket is 'I'll get back to it'.

stage.name: Promote
stage.intent: Top 3 themes → product backlog. FAQ updated.

tasks.task: Identify top 3 themes from this week

stage.decision-gate: Required output: 3 backlog items + FAQ diff. Without this, support stays a black hole.

extra.value: [Major feature decisions from support — escalate to scoping session, Refund processing policy changes — handled in launch-operations refund playbook]
['Support inbox routed (email, Crisp, or similar)', FAQ page exists]
[Sweeping daily and burning out — 2x/week is the cadence, Treating every feature request as a roadmap input — filter by theme convergence]
['Did the top 3 themes actually land in the backlog, or in a ''maybe'' note?', 'Did I answer the same question twice without updating FAQ?']

{human: faion get-content customer-support-inbox-sweep --format md, agent: faion get-content customer-support-inbox-sweep --format context, json: faion get-content customer-support-inbox-sweep --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft for F-064 P1 solo SaaS builder persona}]
